name: io.github.mgthompo1/anchorr-mcp
description: Agent-native CRM. 25 tools across contacts, companies, deals, sequences, activities, and an enrichment waterfall (Apollo → Hunter → AI research) with shared cache and per-call audit. Same data, automations, and audit trail as the Anchorr web product. Issue scoped per-agent API keys at anchorr.app/settings.
